title: FDA Medical Agent Output
description: Structured JSON the medical specialist agent emits for one fda_regulatory_events row. Validated by modal_workers/shared/fda_agent_validator.py before any DB write.

endpoint_quality.description: 1=poor (post-hoc, surrogate, small N) ... 5=hard endpoint, well-powered, prespecified.

safety_concerns.description: Short phrases describing safety signals from the trial or pharmacovigilance data.

effect_size_pp.description: Magnitude on the primary endpoint vs control, in absolute percentage points or other natural units. Negative values are allowed (drug worsened the endpoint).

precedent_class_outcome.description: Most recent FDA outcome in the same therapeutic class / mechanism.

fair_probability_modifier.description: Signed adjustment in pp to fair_probability. Bounded ±0.10 by the validator and re-clamped in compose_features.

insufficient_signal.description: Set to true when the medical evidence does not support an asymmetry claim. Honest decline > hedged prose.
